question: How is customer data encrypted, at rest and in transit?

sources.title: Northbeam Encryption Standard - ENC-STD-01
sources.text: All customer data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher.

mock.claim: Customer data is encrypted at rest with AES-256 and in transit with TLS 1.2 or higher.
mock.output: All customer data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher [S1].
